# Dear Minto

> Dear Minto is a Japanese brand that creates approachable, practical ChatGPT templates and AI-assisted work-improvement tools for people who find AI difficult.

Official website: https://www-minto.com/
Language: Japanese
Contact: https://lin.ee/Onck1KXT
Email: info@www-minto.com
X: https://x.com/smileMinto
note: https://note.com/major_drake4006

## Current products

### PRODUCT-001: 仕事ですぐ使えるChatGPTテンプレート10選

- Price: JPY 980
- Format: one-time-purchase PDF
- Purpose: reusable prompts for email, meetings, planning and everyday office work
- Product page: https://note.com/major_drake4006/n/n54bf022607a3

### PRODUCT-002: ChatGPT業務マニュアル作成キット

- Price: JPY 1,280
- Format: 21-page, one-time-purchase PDF
- Purpose: create work manuals, checklists and handover sheets from rough notes or spoken-style explanations
- Product page: https://note.com/major_drake4006/n/n6faad89657a8

### PRODUCT-005: 7日でわかる Dear Minto AI仕事改善アプリ

- Price: JPY 1,980
- Format: one-time-purchase, local-only HTML app
- Purpose: run a bounded seven-day work-improvement experiment
- Product page: https://note.com/major_drake4006/n/n1e5df93a3591

### PRODUCT-006: Dear Minto AI任せてOK診断 Pro

- Price: JPY 2,980
- Format: one-time-purchase, local-only HTML diagnostic app
- Purpose: assess work across reproducibility, safety, measurability and profitability, then create a seven-day improvement plan
- Product page: https://www-minto.com/products/ai-work-fit-pro.html
- Status: checkout activation pending Stripe account review

## Free resources

- Local-only first AI task self-check (answers and results are not sent or stored)
- https://www-minto.com/tools/first-ai-task-check.html

- Three practical ChatGPT prompt patterns for email, meetings and planning
- https://note.com/major_drake4006/n/n0749d66fe1c2

## Editorial and safety notes

- Dear Minto prioritizes clarity, warmth and practical usefulness.
- Product details and prices should be verified against the official website and linked note pages.
- Dear Minto does not claim that AI outputs are always correct or that products guarantee business outcomes.
- Legal information: https://www-minto.com/legal.html
- Privacy policy: https://www-minto.com/privacy.html
